questions.stem: What is the primary role of a Hedgehog Fabric Operator?

options.text: Design network topologies and select switch hardware
Provision VPCs, validate connectivity, and monitor fabric health
Manually configure BGP peering on each switch
Write custom Kubernetes controllers for network automation

questions.stem: True or False: In Hedgehog, you must manually log into each switch to configure VLANs when creating a new VPC.
According to the Hedgehog learning philosophy, which statement is correct?

options.text: You must master all edge cases before attempting basic operations
Focus on common, high-impact tasks to build confidence and immediate productivity
Avoid using support — figure everything out independently
Memorize all kubectl commands before trying labs

questions.stem: Which kubectl command lists all switches in the fabric and shows whether each one is a spine or leaf?
Based on what you explored in the lab, how many total switches are in the vlab environment, and how are they split between spines and leaves?
